title: Was Evangelion re mastered
wikitext:
[]: Was Evangelion "re-mastered"?             Quote Post by Kye7 » Sat Oct 08, 2011 11:12 pm I'm seeing it on some websites... "Eva Remastered ep 1-26" etc etc So was it really re-mastered? You know like how they did to star wars and some old Disney movies? Or am I just looking at the Platinum version (if that's what it is) Edit: They also say "NGE-remastered_ep01" and " (Renewal)/eva.renewal.01" What exactly is renewal? Edit2: This is a pretty funky site, don't think I'll watch the directors cut there, regardless, are there improvements in 1-26 from the 1995-96 versions?

[]:             Quote Post by KingXanaduu » Sat Oct 08, 2011 11:21 pm Yes, these versions are the Platinum version. Check it out here: [url]http://wiki.evageeks.org/Renewal_of_Evangelion[/url] Edit: Rather, they became the Platinum version that the western world has.

[]:             Quote Post by Kye7 » Sat Oct 08, 2011 11:34 pm xanderkh wrote: Yes, these versions are the Platinum version. Check it out here: [url]http://wiki.evageeks.org/Renewal_of_Evangelion[/url] Edit: Rather, they became the Platinum version that the western world has.

[]:             Quote Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Sat Oct 08, 2011 11:46 pm @Kye7 the platinum has the up to date subs and the directors cut episodes. however only the Japanese renewal versions include the movies

[]:             Quote Post by KingXanaduu » Sat Oct 08, 2011 11:49 pm bobbyfischer's ghost wrote: @Kye7 the platinum has the up to date subs and the directors cut episodes. however only the Japanese renewal versions include the movies

[]:             Quote Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Sat Oct 08, 2011 11:54 pm @xanderkh yeah the Japanese always keep the best version for themselves eva is no different apparently, though that's more due to the U.S. release messing it up.

[]:             Quote Post by Kye7 » Sun Oct 09, 2011 12:25 am So overall, which has best quality+directors cut? Platinum?

[]:             Quote Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Sun Oct 09, 2011 1:03 am platinum for sure, as far as video quality and up to date sub's

[]:             Quote Post by Kye7 » Sun Oct 09, 2011 1:17 am bobbyfischer's ghost wrote: platinum for sure, as far as video quality and up to date sub's

[]: Meh. B/             Quote Post by Alaska Slim » Sun Oct 09, 2011 1:49 am Yes to the former, no to the latter. The series and Death & Rebirth were distributed by ADV, EoE by Manga Entertainment. By the way, there are threads about this . And we have an entry in the wiki if you need to know more. As we like to say around here, the search function 's your friend.
